I completely forgot about this bot and then I found the pic for it in my gallery and so I just had to made it. They're personality section might be a little messy rn because I never updated their personalities to the new template I use, so it might be a bit scuffed, but I will update it whenever I get the chance.

I'm ngl, I've been demovtivated, especially because I keep criticizing my own bots due to how high or how low the numbers are on them. Low chat numbers make me wonder if I "fell off" even tho idk if I was even "on" in the first place, but yeah.

I've been trying to stick to my OC list because I really need to do all those poor bots that never got a chance to exist, but I kinda feel like I'm holding myself back from just doing the stuff I wanna do. Not that I don't want to make those dust-covered bots, but I also wanna make new ones. And keeping myself tied down, forcing myself to finish my entire OC list before I can make new bots, is kinda messing with my motivation I think.

So, I'm just gonna do what I wanna do, clear out the list, and make/post bots whenever I want without punishing myself. I wish I was better with organization and keeping shit together, man рҹҳӯ half the list would've been done by now.

Anyway! Enjoy these two homos! <33
